2605.07731.title: Benchmarking EngGPT2-16B-A3B against Comparable Italian and International Open-source LLMs
2605.07731.paper_summary: This report benchmarks the performance of ENGINEERING Ingegneria Informatica S.p.A.'s EngGPT2MoE-16B-A3B LLM, a 16B parameter Mixture of Experts (MoE) model with 3B active parameters. Performance is investigated across a wide variety of representative benchmarks, and is compared against comparably-sized open-source MoE and dense models. In comparison with popular Italian models, namely FastwebMIIA-7B, Minerva-7B, Velvet-14B, and LLaMAntino-3-ANITA-8B, EngGPT2MoE-16B-A3B performs as well or better on international benchmarks: ARC-Challenge, GSM8K, AIME24, AIME25, MMLU, and HumanEval (HE). It achieves the best performance for the longest context setting (32k) of the RULER benchmark. On the Italian benchmark dataset ITALIC, the model performs as well or better than the other models except for Velvet-14B, which outperforms it. Compared with popular MoE models of comparable size, the new model reports higher values than DeepSeek-MoE-16B-Chat on all considered benchmarks. It has higher values than Moonlight-16B-A3B on HE, MMLU, AIME24, AIME25, GSM8K, and the 32k RULER setting, but lower on BFCL and some ARC and ITALIC settings. Finally it has lower values than GPT-OSS-20B on most benchmarks, including HE, MMLU, AIME24, AIME25, GSM8K, ARC, BFCL, and the RULER 32k. When compared with popular dense models, EngGPT2MoE-16B-A3B reports higher values on AIME24 and AIME25 than Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct, Gemma-3-12b-it, and Ministral-3-8BInstruct-2512-BF16, but lower values on ITALIC, BFCL, and RULER with a 32k context. When performance is aggregated across all benchmark metrics, EngGPT2MoE-16B-A3B shows higher performance than the Italian models under evaluation while achieving lower results than some of the most performant international models, in particular GPT-5 nano and Qwen3-8B. Taken together, our findings find the new model to be a step forward for native Italian Large Language Models.
2605.07731.paper_summary_zh: 本報告對ENGINEERING Ingegneria Informatica S.p.A.的EngGPT2MoE-16B-A3B LLM進行性能基準測試，該模型為一個擁有16B參數的專家混合模型（MoE），其中有3B活躍參數。性能在各種代表性基準上進行調查，並與同等大小的開源MoE和密集模型進行比較。與流行的意大利模型相比，即FastwebMIIA-7B、Minerva-7B、Velvet-14B和LLaMAntino-3-ANITA-8B，EngGPT2MoE-16B-A3B在國際基準上表現相當或更佳：ARC-Challenge、GSM8K、AIME24、AIME25、MMLU和HumanEval (HE)。在RULER基準的最長上下文設置（32k）中，它達到了最佳性能。在意大利基準數據集ITALIC上，該模型的表現與其他模型相當或更佳，除了Velvet-14B，其表現優於該模型。與同等大小的流行MoE模型相比，新模型在所有考慮的基準上報告的值均高於DeepSeek-MoE-16B-Chat。在HE、MMLU、AIME24、AIME25、GSM8K和32k RULER設置上，其值高於Moonlight-16B-A3B，但在BFCL和一些ARC及ITALIC設置上則較低。最後，在大多數基準上，其值低於GPT-OSS-20B，包括HE、MMLU、AIME24、AIME25、GSM8K、ARC、BFCL和RULER 32k。與流行的密集模型相比，EngGPT2MoE-16B-A3B在AIME24和AIME25上的報告值高於Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct、Gemma-3-12b-it和Ministral-3-8BInstruct-2512-BF16，但在ITALIC、BFCL和RULER的32k上下文中則較低。當將所有基準指標的性能進行匯總時，EngGPT2MoE-16B-A3B的表現高於評估中的意大利模型，同時在一些最具性能的國際模型中（特別是GPT-5 nano和Qwen3-8B）則表現較低。綜合來看，我們的發現認為這個新模型是意大利本土大型語言模型的一個進步。
2605.07731.author: Andrea Sassella et.al.
2605.07731.authors: Andrea Sassella, Andrea Chizzola, Tommaso Bianchi, Luca Alessandrelli, Mark James Carman
